@if (scorecard(); as sc) {
{{ sc.grade }} {{ sc.overallScore | number:'1.0-1' }} / 100
{{ sc.periodStart }} — {{ sc.periodEnd }}

Delivery (40%)

Total POs {{ sc.totalPurchaseOrders }}
Lines Received {{ sc.totalLinesReceived }}
On-Time {{ sc.onTimeDeliveryPercent | number:'1.0-1' }}%
Late Deliveries {{ sc.lateDeliveries }}

Quality (30%)

Inspected {{ sc.totalInspected }}
Rejected {{ sc.totalRejected }}
NCRs {{ sc.totalNcrs }}
Acceptance Rate {{ sc.qualityAcceptancePercent | number:'1.0-1' }}%

Price (20%)

Total Spend {{ sc.totalSpend | currency }}
Avg Price Variance {{ sc.avgPriceVariancePercent | number:'1.0-1' }}%

Quantity (10%)

Qty Accuracy {{ sc.quantityAccuracyPercent | number:'1.0-1' }}%
} @else if (!loading()) { }
